title: Goovee configuration
description: The single configuration document for Goovee — a reserved "$global" section (deployment-wide settings) plus one entry per tenant, keyed by the tenant id (the URL path segment, letters only). Set TENANTS_CONFIG_FILE or TENANTS_CONFIG to point at it. Single-tenant is just a one-entry document keyed "d". Nothing is inherited: a section a tenant omits is simply off for that tenant, never filled from the environment or another tenant.

globalConfig.description: Deployment-wide settings, shared by every tenant because they are bound to the single origin / process.

betterAuthSecret.description: Better Auth signing/encryption secret (the BETTER_AUTH_SECRET equivalent).

betterAuthUrl.description: Better Auth base URL (the BETTER_AUTH_URL equivalent).

url.description: Postgres connection URL of this tenant's own database. Every tenant has its own database; isolation is per-database.
Base URL of the AOS instance, e.g. https://erp.example.com/axelor-erp. Unique per tenant in topology A (dedicated AOS); shared across tenants in topology B (AOS multi-tenancy).

aosTenantId.description: AOS-side tenant id — independent of the Goovee tenant id. Set it when this tenant lives on a shared AOS instance with AOS multi-tenancy (topology B): every AOS call then carries X-Tenant-ID with this value. Leave unset for a dedicated AOS instance (topology A).

storage.description: This tenant's file-storage directory (created on first connect). Back it with a mounted volume so uploads survive.

auth.description: AOS credentials: apiKey (AOS 9+, generated in AOS under Preferences → API Keys) or username/password basic auth. apiKey wins when both are set.

webhookSecret.description: Secret AOS uses to sign notification webhooks for this tenant (the NOTIFICATION_WEBHOOK_SECRET equivalent).

payments.description: Per-tenant merchant accounts. A provider a tenant omits is simply unavailable for that tenant.

live.description: true for live payments; defaults to sandbox.

webhookSecret.description: Stripe webhook signing secret for this tenant's webhook endpoint.

legacyForwardUrl.description: Where to forward Up2Pay IPNs this tenant cannot attribute to a Goovee payment (legacy-ERP invoices, unknown context). Omit to not forward.

hubpisp.description: Register this tenant's BPCE webhook under the tenant-scoped path /api/tenant/<tenantId>/webhooks/hubpisp/... so the webhook uses this tenant's credentials.

certsDir.description: Directory holding this tenant's mTLS files client.crt and private-key.pem; defaults to certs/hubpisp.

mattermost.description: The Mattermost host is browser-facing — set it per tenant via publicEnv.GOOVEE_PUBLIC_MATTERMOST_HOST.

oauth.description: Per-tenant OAuth applications. Each provider is registered at startup under the provider id '<provider>-<tenantId>' — register the matching redirect URI (/api/auth/oauth2/callback/<provider>-<tenantId>) with the identity provider. There is no global app: a tenant offers a provider only when it declares it here.

issuer.description: Keycloak realm issuer URL. Each tenant uses its own realm.

webPush.description: Web-push signing identity; the public key lives in publicEnv.GOOVEE_PUBLIC_VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY. A browser holds one push subscription per service-worker registration, so per-tenant key pairs only take effect once tenants run on their own domains.

subject.description: mailto: address or https: URL identifying the sender to push services.

includeLanguage.description: Also load the base language (e.g. 'en' for 'en-US') in addition to the specific locale. Defaults to false.

uploadRecordRetentionHours.description: How long terminal staged-upload records are kept before the prune sweep deletes them. Defaults to 168 (7 days).

publicEnv.description: Browser-exposed variables for this tenant (declared in full; not inherited from the environment).
